cases.testName: RT00 has no incumbent and therefore no numerical proposal identity
RT01-RT09 match frozen numerical outcomes and preserve or improve the exact baseline
RT10-RT13 map normalization, atomic iteration, underflow, and convergence failures
all four numerical caps stop before charge and exact caps complete naturally
cap precedence suppresses callback and clock at the pending numerical unit
callback true, throw, and nonboolean stop at every numerical kind
absolute deadline, clock failure, and one monotonic history cover every numerical kind
proposal-only seam maps the three naturally unreachable core failure codes
authorization seam is phase-limited and requires recursive exact receipt identity
pool permutation, captured mutation, reentrancy, freshness, and deep freeze are deterministic

limitations: This artifact binds the exact retained independent runtime-oracle source; the repository test gate executes that source, while the historical evaluator validates its canonical identity and derives the decision clause from the declared outcomes.
The historical evaluation does not inject failures into market cells, and this evidence makes no timing, performance, default-mode, production, or unrestricted-optimality claim.
